feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA has always been shit
entry.content: What does this franchise offer in terms of a fulfilling experience? You play as a criminal who steals cars, kills people, and sleeps with prostitutes. There's no thematic value here, no great narratives or any kind of substance. Even the gameplay is bare bones and boring. A lifeless open world modelled after real American shitholes coupled with linear fetch quest story missions. GTA is the definition of soulless mediocrity, and the fact that so many are excited for the next instalment in this ab

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Protagonist 1: >man jawed ugly brown woman who speaks with an obnoxious spanglis…
entry.content: Protagonist 1: >man jawed ugly brown woman who speaks with an obnoxious spanglish accent, intended for teenage Edgars (majority of US teenagers now) to go "Yo this bitch bad as hell cuh, no quema fr" to Protagonist 2: >generic white male to not alienate the five remaining white GTA fans, doodlenigger white trash who probably wears a monster cap and says WHOLE NOTHER LEVEL DUUUUDE Did they design this game to have the most uncharismatic and unlikable protagonists possible on purpose? Is it advanc

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >spend literally 1 thousand hours on GTA online playing racing exclusively >have…
entry.content: >spend literally 1 thousand hours on GTA online playing racing exclusively >haven't been able to enjoy any game at all that aren't racing games >buy forza horizon 6 and am having a fucking blast Why did it take this long for me to realize that I like racing games? I'm literally fucking retarded. Why on earth didn't I buy a racing game a long time ago instead of playing GTA online only for the racing? It's terrible and completely dead. Sometimes I really think that I have some type of mental hand

entry.title: /int/ International: Quiero que hechen a España de la Union Europea.
entry.content: Lo mas rápido posible. No lo digo en broma. (1) He ido al INEM/SEPE. El inútil de allí se equivoca copiando mi numero de teléfono, nombre, NIE, email. No saben leer o escribir pero cobran su sueldo, funcionarios los llaman. (2) Otra: Mando mi CV a una ETT en Holanda para largarme de una puta vez de aquí. Los genios de allí, al ver que vivo en España y hablo Ingles, ponen a una recruiter Española para entrevistarme. En Ingles. "jellou, hau ar yu?" "¿Que?" "claramente usted no sabe ingles". FUERA

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >discord >instagram >apple >gmail have zoomers killed tech and software? they ha…
entry.content: >discord >instagram >apple >gmail have zoomers killed tech and software? they handed the keys to a handful of corporations refuse to let shitty companies die or let competition even exist at all. we superior millenials switched services every couple years and kept those jews on their toes.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Sarah-N-Tuned complains the McDonalds struts on the "new" Toyota Rav 4 limit the…
entry.content: Sarah-N-Tuned complains the McDonalds struts on the "new" Toyota Rav 4 limit the off-road handling (I can relate to this complaint), and says the electronic AWD with no mechanical linkage front to back is disconcerting. She praises the steering feel, however. https://youtu.be/xw73zcOzXSI Also, her outfits need more color. Every episode, beige, white, pale blue, grey.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: /ORG/ - Offroad General
entry.content: Welcome to 4chan's Offroad General! On July 4th, 2026, we mark 250 years of American freedom. Conquering untamed trails in 4x4s is our manifest destiny. Just like Lewis and Clark, we conquer the unknown, tackling the most unforgiving terrain that our beautiful country has to offer. Other countries will never have the trails and trucks that Americans are blessed with. Give me liberty, or give me death. Previous thread: >>28936348

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Chicago appreciation thread
entry.content: Terry Kath deserves all the praise he gets but he's had more than plenty. Can we take a second to acknowledge that literally every member of this band was a fucking monster musician? Genuinely one of the most OP lineups of all time in both raw talent and exciting presentation. Danny Seraphine is one of the most underrated drummers in rock. Even Peter Cetera, however anyone feels about his later adult contemporary slop, was still a really good bassist. Also RIP Walter Parazaider. https://www.yout

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Are recalls pointless now? >20 years ago >some vehicles engines explode or drive…
entry.content: Are recalls pointless now? >20 years ago >some vehicles engines explode or drivers die >announcement of a huge vehicle recall >vehicle has some insane issue that is complex to fix >have to bring it to shop and leave it for a few weeks >today >announce of a huge vehicle recall out of nowhere >vehicle is has a small UI bug (icon is 5% smaller than regulations) >car auto updates overnight while sleeping >nobody was ever harmed or impacted

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump: unfair for Iran to lack ballistic missiles if other countries have them
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/middl e-east/trump-unfair-iran-lack-balli stic-missiles-if-other-countries-ha ve-them-2026-06-17/ >PARIS, June 17 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that it would be unfair for Iran not to have ballistic missiles if other countries have them. >"I'm saying that if other countries have them, it's a little bit unfair for them not to have some," Trump told reporters in Paris. >"If Saudi Arabia and Qatar, and they all have some, I would say in rela

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Say what you want about Ubisoft games, but can we take a minute to appreciate th…
entry.content: Say what you want about Ubisoft games, but can we take a minute to appreciate the Discovery Tour they've been adding to their latest games? It's really fucking kino to walk around Ancient Greece or Ancient Egypt with a curated guide. It's essentially a walking sim but the worlds are beautiful.
